title: How AI Coding Agents Work
description: Peek inside the agent loop to understand how AI agents read, reason about, and modify your code

lessons.title: Anatomy of an Agent
lessons.description: Inside the observe-plan-act loop that drives every AI coding agent

lessons.title: Context Windows Explained
lessons.description: How agents see your code and what happens when they can't see enough

lessons.title: Tool Use and Actions
lessons.description: How agents interact with your codebase through tools like Read, Edit, and Bash

lessons.title: Agent Decision Making
lessons.description: How agents choose what to do next and why they sometimes choose wrong

lessons.title: Common Agent Failures
lessons.description: Why agents fail, what the failure modes look like, and how to prevent them
